name: Neural Nomad #23: Emerald — Sentinel
description: Some growth demands a guardian. The parts of you that are still forming need protection from the parts that would devour them whole. This is the hour when you become your own sentry.
threshold_note: The edge between protecting what's tender and building walls that will later need breaking.
collector_meaning: You hold the moment when someone learned to stand guard over their own becoming. The weight of necessary vigilance, before trust returns.
